name: Alice Chen
profile_text: Alice Chen specializes in Real Estate Law and Tenant Rights. Past wins: Secured rapid injunctions under the Rent Control Act against illegal evictions for residential tenants. Successfully negotiated commercial lease disputes.

name: Bob Patel
profile_text: Bob Patel is a Senior Partner specializing in Corporate Law and Mergers & Acquisitions. Past wins: Handled complex commercial contract disputes and structured multi-million dollar corporate mergers. Not currently taking small claims.

name: David Lee
profile_text: David Lee handles Family Law and General Civil Disputes. Past wins: Finalized contentious divorces, negotiated child custody agreements, and handled small-scale breach of contract civil suits.
